omni_substrate_manifest.system_directive: MANDATORY EXECUTION: 100% Competent Base-Matter JSON Implementation for Core Task V3.9. Eradication of Timestamps and Central Oracles. Masterless Consensus via Thermodynamic Gravity.

Authorize Chamber 03 drop.

Hard-crystallize the heavy payload to the local substrate. SENSE resulting physical mass pressure on localized housing. IF Structural Pressure > Host Limit: TRIGGER MITOSIS. implementation_mechanics_prompt.instruction: This schema accepts no orchestration. It resolves conflict based entirely on who bled the most to achieve their reality.
